assumptions: single dark fluid sector with minimal kinetic coupling
linear perturbation theory valid on comparison scales
observational inputs remain within published systematics and calibration bounds
repo_boundaries: not a final cosmological truth claim

observable_predictions.falsification_rule: reject only if DESI_DR2_BAO likelihood mismatch exceeds declared threshold after allowed parameter variation

observable_predictions.observable: Type Ia supernova luminosity-distance / distance-modulus predictions
observable_predictions.falsification_rule: reject only if PantheonPlus likelihood mismatch exceeds declared threshold after allowed parameter variation and covariance treatment

observable_predictions.observable: CMB background and angular-power-spectrum consistency predictions
required_model_outputs: C_ell summary or likelihood-compatible compressed prediction
observable_predictions.falsification_rule: reject only if Planck_ACT consistency likelihood mismatch exceeds declared threshold under stated assumptions

deep_search_result.dfm_mkc_repo_status: repository surface closed under declared reproducibility rules, not a cosmological truth claim

non_claims: does not prove a DFM-MKC cosmology theorem
does not independently reproduce DESI DR2 likelihoods
does not independently reproduce PantheonPlus likelihoods
does not independently reproduce Planck or ACT likelihoods
